rows.summary: Item 1 shifts from describing a unit franchise model to exclusively describing an Area Representative (AR) franchise model — a fundamental restructuring of the business opportunity offered. The NEW version eliminates all references to operating a 'Ledgers' unit franchise business and instead defines the franchise as solely an AR role: recruiting, supporting, and receiving compensation from unit franchisees. Key contractual changes include explicit, detailed compensation formulas (50% of net initial fee and royalty), defined ongoing obligations (recruiting, screening, training support, marketing, quality control, franchisee relations), compliance mandates (state registration, FDD delivery), and removal of any unit-level operational rights or territorial exclusivity for service delivery. rows.summary: The 2026 FDD Item 1 substantially expands and refines the description of the franchise system — shifting from a dual-brand (MH/HWR) transitional narrative in 2025 to a fully articulated, technology-forward, multi-modal HEIGHTS WELLNESS RETREAT (HWR) concept with detailed service categories, operational principles, and market rationale. It clarifies that MH franchises still operate (not just 'in process of rebranding'), adds specificity about touchless modalities (e.g., red light therapy, cryotherapy), introduces formalized operating model pillars (multi-revenue, balanced labor, scalable format, recurring revenue foundation, community architecture, tech integration), and strengthens franchisor discretion over system evolution.

oldEvidence.quote: In October 2024, we began offering an updated franchise model offering touchless holistic therapies in addition to the core professional therapeutic massage and facial services under our new mark HEIGHTS WELLNESS RETREAT

As of the issuance date of this Disclosure Document, we are in the process of rebranding and do not anticipate issuing new licenses for the right to operate under the MASSAGE HEIGHTS or MASSAGE HEIGHTS BODY + FACE marks

Your Franchised Business will also offer touchless holistic therapies and you will be required to purchase equipment to provide touchless body care; light, salt and recovery therapies; and meditation services.

newEvidence.quote: As of the issuance date of this Disclosure Document, the franchise system includes both MH Franchises that continue to operate under the MASSAGE HEIGHTS and MASSAGE HEIGHTS BODY + FACE marks and HWR Franchises operating under the HEIGHTS WELLNESS RETREAT mark.

HWR Franchised Businesses deploy a curated suite of technology-driven, touchless wellness therapies and devices. These modalities are designed to deliver therapeutic and rejuvenative benefits with reduced reliance on licensed practitioners... Red light therapy and photobiomodulation systems • Infrared sauna and thermal therapy suites • Cryotherapy and cold exposure modalities

The System is designed around several key operational principles: • Multi-Revenue-Category Model... • Balanced Labor Model... • Scalable and Replicable Format... • Recurring Revenue Foundation... • Consumer Retention and Community Architecture... • Technology Integration.

The Food and Drug Administration finalized a rule in late 2022 that would impose traceability requirements on a wide range of food establishments, including some restaurants.

newEvidence.quote: As of December 28, 2024, it owned and operated 2,329 Panda Express Restaurants.
